images.desc: Enables intuitive and precise teleoperation of the Follow arm via the Leader arm, providing smooth operation with gravity compensation.
Works with MuJoCo and Isaac Sim for realistic testing and reinforcement learning.
Compliant, backdrivable joints enable safe, practical human-centered interaction.
Two-way force feedback for contact-rich teleoperation and real-world data collection.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Core features accelerating innovation from research to mass production

items.title: Bimanual System
items.desc: Perfectly synchronized bimanual 14DOF control enables human-level complex task execution.

items.title: 1kHz CAN-FD Control
items.desc: High-speed communication protocol developed based on CAN-FD realizes ultra-precise real-time motion control.

items.title: Affordable Platform
items.desc: An open-source-based affordable price dramatically lowers the barrier to entry for research and industrial applications.

items.title: Lightweight & Powerful
items.desc: Despite its light 5.5kg arm weight, it boasts a powerful peak payload of up to 6kg.

items.title: Open Source Ecosystem
items.desc: Fully compatible with ROS2 and supported by a rich open-source community for rapid development.

items.title: Built for AI
items.desc: Provides a hardware architecture optimized for deploying Sim-to-Real reinforcement learning models.

stats.title: Core Specifications

comparison.title_main:
Not a perfect industrial robot.
But the most reasonable starting point for humanoid research.
comparison.title_desc: OpenArm is an innovative open-source robotics project globally available for AI research. We don't claim the flawless precision of multi-million-dollar industrial equipment, but it is undeniably the best platform for physical AI research. Libertron's role is simple: we eliminate a minimum of 3+ months and countless trials and errors you would otherwise waste on overseas sourcing, assembly, and setup. Now, simply focus on your research.

items.label: Setup Time
items.diy_desc: Individual shipping from 10+ overseas vendors, risk of missing parts
items.pro_desc: Fast delivery via single vendor with complete documentation

items.label: Assembly Effort
items.diy_desc: Dozens of hours waiting for 3D prints + complex fastening
items.pro_desc: Fully assembled by Libertron's expert engineers before shipping

items.label: Initial Software
items.diy_desc: Scouring community issues for ROS2 integration and debugging
items.pro_desc: Basic operation verified; out-of-the-box example code provided

items.label: Maintenance
items.diy_desc: No overseas returns or free repairs for burned motors
items.pro_desc:
Transparent and fast B2B technical support system
(Currently serving South Korea only)

comparison.cta_msg: When you factor in time and risk, it's ultimately the most affordable choice.

products_page.subtitle: The moment vision becomes reality. OpenArm Official Integration Kit.

faq.subtitle: Here are the most common questions about the OpenArm robotic arm.

items.question: How is OpenArm different from existing industrial robotic arms?
items.answer: OpenArm is the ultimate starting machine to experience collaborative robots at a reasonable price. Unlike expensive industrial robots, we eliminated price bubbles while keeping research-grade specifications. It is comprehensively designed based on open-source so anyone can easily access and modify it, making it optimized for education, research, and prototyping.

items.question: Can I control it directly using Python or ROS2?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely! OpenArm provides a Python API and can be directly coded and controlled in various environments including C++, ROS2, and WebSockets. It is the best platform for robotics students or AI researchers who want to quickly deploy deep learning and reinforcement learning (RL) models onto a physical robot arm.

items.question: Is it suitable for university labs or high school robotics courses?
items.answer: It is the best choice. With its compact size and light weight, you can safely experiment even in tight spaces. Thanks to its intuitive teaching pendant functionality and open-source nature, it can be utilized in all environments from basic coding education to advanced robotics dynamics research.

items.question: Can I attach accessories like grippers or cameras?
items.answer: Yes, beyond the standard grippers for the Leader and Follower arms, we are expanding our lineup to include custom grippers, suction pumps, and various end effectors. With optional high-performance depth cameras (e.g., Intel RealSense D435i, D455, D405), vision AI-based autonomous pick-and-place tasks can be implemented with ease.

items.question: How does after-sales and technical support work?
items.answer: Libertron provides a one-stop solution covering the entire process of equipment adoption from consultation and delivery to technical support based on products manufactured in Korea. For customers in Korea, we ensure fast and seamless supply without complex import procedures. For international customers, products are delivered safely and efficiently through global logistics partners such as FedEx.
